name: context-lsp
description: Codex-centered CLI and skill layer for ContextPack retrieval, project-brain bootstrapping, warning-first guards, drift checks, and diagnostics.

interface.shortDescription: ContextPack retrieval, project-brain bootstrap, and warning-first guards for Codex.
interface.longDescription: Context LSP helps Codex bootstrap project-brain docs, retrieve ContextPacks, enforce warning-first output guards, report architecture drift, and recommend documentation updates across greenfield and brownfield work.
defaultPrompt: Use Context LSP to bootstrap this project brain.
Use Context LSP to retrieve a ContextPack for this change.
Use Context LSP to verify architecture drift and recommend doc updates.
